Release notes for PebbleOS v1.10.2 with bug fixes for AppMessage, alarm app, and sports app layout.

# Purpose
This document announces the release of PebbleOS version 1.10.2 for the Pebble SmartWatch. It includes details about bug fixes, such as improvements in AppMessage error handling, resolution of a crash in the alarm app, and minor layout adjustments in the built-in sports app.
